raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current pressure points","name":"What feels most on your plate right now, Sarah?","description":"Lets Sarah set the current context before the feedback turns specific.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Impact evidence","name":"What was the clearest business outcome from your work this quarter?","description":"Surfaces concrete impact rather than activity or effort.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder signal","name":"Where did your work need stakeholder buy-in this quarter?","description":"Tests how she creates visibility and influence with cross-functional partners.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Senior bar","name":"What does good look like at Senior level in your view?","description":"Checks her internal model of the performance bar she is being judged against.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility gap","name":"Where do you think your work is easiest to miss?","description":"Surfaces the parts of her approach that may not be visible enough to busy stakeholders.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-team friction","name":"What usually slows you down when another team is involved?","description":"Gets at handoff friction and how proactively she handles it.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Signal choices","name":"What do you choose to make visible before the work is done?","description":"Explores whether she raises risks, tradeoffs, and progress early enough for stakeholders.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Execution tradeoff","name":"What are you deliberately not spending time on so you can raise your influence?","description":"Forces a concrete tradeoff between execution load and stakeholder-facing work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next behaviour shift","name":"What is the first behaviour you want to change from this feedback?","description":"Turns the conversation into a concrete commitment rather than a general reflection.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What is the first concrete thing you want to move by our next conversation?","description":"Closes on a specific action and timeline without opening a new topic.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
